name: Macro Oscillator
description: This algorithm is an implementation of the open source Braids module by Émilie Gillet. This implementation should behave and sound identical to the original, with the caveat that the original module runs at 96kHz – for a totally accurate recreation, you would need to run the disting NT at 96kHz. Any demos or tutorials you may find online should apply just as well to this version.

parameters.name: Model
parameters.description: Chooses the synthesis model.

parameters.name: Timbre
parameters.description: Sets the timbre control.

parameters.name: Colour
parameters.description: Sets the colour control.

parameters.name: AD Attack
parameters.description: Sets the envelope attack time.

parameters.name: AD Decay
parameters.description: Sets the envelope decay time.

parameters.name: AD FM
parameters.description: Sets the amount by which the envelope affects the FM.

parameters.name: AD Timbre
parameters.description: Sets the amount by which the envelope affects the timbre.

parameters.name: AD Colour
parameters.description: Sets the amount by which the envelope affects the colour1.

parameters.name: AD VCA
parameters.description: Sets whether the envelope is applied to the volume of the output.

parameters.name: Coarse
parameters.description: Coarse tuning control.

parameters.name: Fine
parameters.description: Fine tuning control.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.description: Sets the quantizer scale.

parameters.name: Root
parameters.description: Sets the quantizer root note.

parameters.name: Resolution
parameters.description: Sets the output bit depth.

parameters.name: Sample rate
parameters.description: Sets the sample rate decimation.

parameters.name: Trigger source
parameters.description: Enables automatic triggering on pitch changes.

parameters.name: Trigger delay
parameters.description: Sets the trigger delay.

parameters.name: Flatten
parameters.description: applies a detuning in the lower and higher frequencies, to recreate some of the tuning imperfections of VCOs.

parameters.name: Drift
parameters.description: recreates the drifting of a disastrously designed VCO.

parameters.name: Signature
parameters.description: applies grungy glitches/waveform imperfections to the output signal. The exact behavior of this option is unique to each module built.

parameters.name: Gain
parameters.description: Sets an output gain.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

parameters.name: MIDI mode
parameters.description: Controls the algorithm's response to MIDI.

parameters.name: I2C mode
parameters.description: Controls the algorithm's response to I2C.

parameters.name: MIDI channel
parameters.description: The MIDI channel to receive on.

parameters.name: I2C channel
parameters.description: The I2C channel to receive on.

input_ports.name: Trigger input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the trigger input.

input_ports.name: Pitch input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the pitch input.

input_ports.name: FM input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the FM input.

input_ports.name: Timbre input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the timbre input.

input_ports.name: Colour input
input_ports.description: Selects which bus is used as the colour input.

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The output signal of the oscillator

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The bus for the output signal.
